meta.title: Necessary Secrets
meta.description: Hudson Institute book discussion featuring a keynote address by General Michael Hayden and author Gabriel Schoenfeld. Additional comments by Steve Aftergood and Benjamin Wittes. - Captured Live on Ustream at http://www.ustream.tv/channel/hudson-institute
